# getAllRecord

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for GetAllRecord records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app get-all-record list
app get-all-record get --id <value>
app get-all-record create --path <value> --data <value>
app get-all-record update --id <value> [--path <value>] [--data <value>]
app get-all-record delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all getAllRecord records

```bash
app get-all-record list
```

### Create a getAllRecord

```bash
app get-all-record create --path "value" --data "value"
```

### Get a getAllRecord by id

```bash
app get-all-record get --id <value>
```
